title: Validate all JSON schemas are valid
description: Ensures all addon JSON schemas parse correctly and have required fields
command: python -c "import json; import sys; from pathlib import Path; schemas = list(Path('tower/addons/qa/schemas').glob('*.json')); [json.load(open(s)) for s in schemas]; print(f'Validated {len(schemas)} schemas'); sys.exit(0 if schemas else 1)"
